purpose: A page-layout container with a snappable header, sticky title, and scrollable content. The base for Object Page and many other floorplans.
whenToUse: For pages with header metadata + main content
When header should collapse on scroll
whenNotToUse: For simple forms — use Form directly
doRules: Use DynamicPage for Object Page floorplan
Always include DynamicPageTitle and content section
Set showFooter when destructive actions need persistent visibility
dontRules: Do not use DynamicPage for simple forms — use Form
Do not nest DynamicPage inside DynamicPage

layoutGuidance.alignment: Vertical stack: title → header → content → footer.

contentRules: Use semantic slots: title, header, content, footer

responsiveBehavior.M: Header may collapse to save space
responsiveBehavior.S: Header collapsed by default; expand on tap

accessibilityGuidance.requirement: Title is announced as page heading
